log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Khenra — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Khenra — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Khenra — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Khenra — Armored Tank.
→ Khenra — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 10 necrotic damage (half).
--- Khenra — Armored Tank --- HP: 49/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Khenra — Armored Tank --- HP: 49/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 129/135
══ ROUND 4 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Khenra — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Khenra — Armored Tank --- HP: 36/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 123/135
══ ROUND 5 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Khenra — Armored Tank: FAIL! 36 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
